message:
feat(conformance): unified cutover benchmark harness (ukr33.1)

Single repeatable harness measuring all cutover-critical flows:
revocation pipeline (lookup/seal/SLA), FCPC frame seal/open,
Ed25519/BLAKE3/ChaCha20 crypto, gossip push serde, schema serde,
and full cross-cutting enforcement path. Covers 6 benchmark groups
with parametric sizes for regression detection.

Also fixes pre-existing clippy doc_markdown in enforcement.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -51,3 +51,8 @@ base64.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 fcp-registry = { path = "../fcp-registry" }
 fcp-raptorq = { path = "../fcp-raptorq" }
+criterion.workspace = true
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "cutover_harness"
+harness = false
